seoTitle: Lee County School Calendar 2025-2026: Holidays, Breaks & PDF
seoDescription: Lee County School District 2025-2026 calendar with Aug 11 first day, Jun 1 last day, holidays, breaks, weather make-up days, PDF and ICS.
calendarNotes: The School District of Lee County starts the 2025-2026 school year on August 11, 2025 and lists June 1, 2026 as the students' last day and end of Quarter 4. Thanksgiving Break runs November 24-28, Winter Break runs December 22-January 2, and Spring Break runs March 16-20. The calendar lists May 29 and June 1 as early release/weather make-up days and June 3-5 as weather make-up days.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Lee County start school in 2025?
calendarFaqs.a: The School District of Lee County starts school on Monday, August 11, 2025.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Lee County Spring Break in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs Monday, March 16 through Friday, March 20, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Lee County in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The official calendar lists Monday, June 1, 2026 as the students' last day and end of Quarter 4.

calendarFaqs.q: Which Lee County 2025-2026 dates are weather make-up days?
calendarFaqs.a: The calendar lists May 29 and June 1 as early release/weather make-up days and June 3-5 as weather make-up days.

yearNumbers.label: Weather Make-Up Window
yearNumbers.detail: The calendar lists June 3-5 as weather make-up days after the professional duty day.

yearNumbers.label: Early Release/Make-Up Days
yearNumbers.detail: Both dates are marked as early release/weather make-up days.

yearNumbers.label: Spring Break
yearNumbers.detail: Spring Break runs Monday through Friday in mid-March.

events.name: Students Last Day - End of Quarter 4
events.description: Also listed as an early release/weather make-up day.
